excitedToSeeYou: We're so excited to see you again!
passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
emailWarning: Without an email, you won't be able to use the forgot password feature.
tooManyAttempts: Too many login attempts. Please try again later.
forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
resetLinkSentSubtitle: If an account with that email exists, we've sent a password reset link.
cooldownMessage: Please wait {{seconds}}s before requesting another link.
resetSuccessSubtitle: You can now log in with your new password.
invalidOrExpiredToken: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
downloadPromptDesc: For the best experience, download the mqvi desktop app.
welcomeFeature1: Add friends and send direct messages
welcomeFeature3: Create a server or join one with an invite code
welcomeFeature4: Voice & video chat with screen sharing
accountDeletedBody: This account was deleted. You can restore it before {{permanentDeleteAt}}, after which it will be permanently removed.
accountRestoreSuccess: Welcome back! Your account has been restored.
